name: Holiday Appetizer Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Thinly sliced Green onions with tops
2/3 cup Chopped ham, crumbled (e.g., sausage, diced pepperoni, or crumbled cooked bacon)
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUST: Combine flour and cracker crumbs in a bowl. Add crisco and cut in until the mixture resembles coarse oatmeal.
2. Gradually sprinkle with half a cup of water, adding tablespoon at a time. Toss with a fork until the crumbs are completely moistened.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 15x10x1-inch pan. Prick the crust with a fork.
4. FILLING: Sprinkle Swiss cheese, ham, onions, parsley, and diced pimentos evenly over the crust.
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs, whipping cream, half-and-half, salt, and pepper until combined.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the filled crust.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit in a preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool for 5-10 minutes. Cut into 1 1/2 by 2-inch pieces.
9. Serve warm. NOTE: The crust may bubble during baking and require additional pricking with a fork.
